# Master build script for CMake (automatically generated by "mrb newDev")
cmake_minimum_required (VERSION 3.18.2 FATAL_ERROR)

find_package(mrb QUIET REQUIRED)
include(Mrb)

project(larsoft_MRB LANGUAGES NONE)

set(CETMODULES_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX_ORIG "${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}"
  CACHE INTERNAL "Original value of CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX (via mrb)")

include(CTest)

# add_subdirectory() and other commands will be added below by "mrb
# gitCheckout" (a.k.a. mrb g) for each package.

########################################################################
# If you add a package by hand (i.e. *not* via mrb gitCheckout), you
# MUST:
#
#   1. Use mrb uc to update this CMakeLists.txt safely.
#
#   2. Source mrbsetenv
#
#   3. Use mrb uc to ensure the order of inclusion of subdirectories is
#      correct.
########################################################################

# DO NOT DELETE 
# sbncode package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/sbncode)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/sbncode)
# larpandoracontent package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/larpandoracontent)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/larpandoracontent)
# larpandora package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/larpandora)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/larpandora)
# lardataobj package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/lardataobj)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/lardataobj)
# icaruscode package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/icaruscode)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/icaruscode)
# larrecodnn package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/larrecodnn)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/larrecodnn)
# sbnanaobj package block
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/sbnanaobj)
include_directories($ENV{MRB_BUILDDIR}/sbnanaobj)

# DO NOT DELETE 
# sbncode
mrb_add_subdirectory(sbncode)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
# larpandoracontent
mrb_add_subdirectory(larpandoracontent)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
# larpandora
mrb_add_subdirectory(larpandora)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
# lardataobj
mrb_add_subdirectory(lardataobj)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
# icaruscode
mrb_add_subdirectory(icaruscode)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
# larrecodnn
mrb_add_subdirectory(larrecodnn)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
# sbnanaobj
mrb_add_subdirectory(sbnanaobj)
mrb_process_checkpoints()
